raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna dihwoja appafsch
fa Palma·Rohka Debora/ starp
Ramu un starp Betelu/ us Ee-
wraima Kalnu/ un Israëka
Behrni gahje us augfchu pee
winnas Teesâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna nosfuhtija/ un ai-
zinaja Baraku Abinoaima Deh-
lu no Kedes Nawtata/ un faz-
zija us to: Wuj ne irr tew tas
KUNGS Israëta Deews pa-
wehlejs? Efj/ un zellees us Tah-
bora Kalnu/ un nem pee tew det-
mits tuhkftoschus Wihrus no
Nawtata Behrneem/ un no Se-
bulaza Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad peeweddischu es to
Siffern/ Jabina Karra-Spehka
Wirfneeku/ un winna Rattus un
winna Pulku pee tew pee Kisona
Uppes/ un nodohfchu winnu ta-
wâ Rohkâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Baraks us
winnas: Kad tu qribbi ar man-
nim eet/ tad es eefchu/ bet ja tu
ne gribbi lihds eet/ tad es ne
eeefchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna fazzija: Es ee-
tin eefchu ar tevis/ bet tomehr
tas Gohds tew ne peederrehs us
fcho Zelftu/ ko tu taggad statga/
bet tas KUNGS nodohs to Sif-
feru kahdas Seewas Rohkâ. Tad
zehlahs Debora/ un gahje ar Ba-
raku us Kedefu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fatauze Baraks Se-
bulann un Nawtalu Kedefâ/ un
tur zehlahs defmits tuhkftoschi
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Eebers tas Keniteris bi-
atschkihrees no Kaina/ no Obaba
Mohsus Tehwotscha Behrneem/
un bija fawn Dsihwolli uszehlis
pee ta Obsola eeksch Zaãnaim/
kas pee Kedefa irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tappe Sifferam
fluddinahts/ ka Baraks Abino-
aima Dehls bij us Tahbora Kal-
nu gahjis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fasauze Sifferus wi-
fus fawus Rattus/ dewinfimts
Dselsa Rattus/ un wifus Can-
dis/ kas pee winna bija/ no Aro-
seta to Pagann (Pilsfahta)
lihds Kisona Uppei.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Debora us
Baraku: Zeltees / jo fchi irr ta
Deena/ ka tas KUNGS to Sif-
fern tawa Rohkâ dewis irr/ neg-
gi tas KUNGS tawa Preek-
schâ isgahjis? tad zehlahs Ba-
raks no Tahbora Kalna/ un def-
nits tuhkftoschi Wihrí winnam
pakkat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS tsbai-
dija to Siffern ar wisfeem Rat-
teem/ un wiffn to Karra-Speh-
kn preekfsch Baraka Sohbixa Af-
mini/ un Sifferus nolehze no
faweem Ratteem / un behdse
Kahjahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Baraks dsinnahs teem
Ratteem un tam Karra-Speh-
kam pakkat lihds Arosetam to
Pagann (Pilsfahtam)/un wifs
Sifferus Lehgeris tritte zaure
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
